arts.ttl: Trevoh Chalobah to Chelsea return boost emerges as £20m valuation set
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Trevoh Chalobah, currently on loan at Crystal Palace, was left out of the Eagles' FA Cup win over Stockport County due to a "contractual issue" amid reports the Blues want to bring him back to Stamford Bridge. Chelsea will only allow Renato Veiga to leave the club on a permanent basis in the January transfer window, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer's Chelsea promise revealed after one-word message as Reece James raises key question
arts.sum: Tosin later posted on his Instagram story: "Cole Palmer promised me two pairs of trainers if I scored two goals yesterday. However, Tosin opened the scoring six minutes before half-time with a deflected strike from the edge of the penalty area after indulging the Stamford Bridge crowd urging him to shoot.

arts.ttl: Manchester United face Kobbie Mainoo transfer twist as Chelsea in competition for midfielder
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly on standby to swoop for Kobbie Mainoo if Manchester United fail to secure a new contract with the young talent. United initially proposed a new contract for the midfielder at the end of last season, who currently earns around £20,000 per week.

arts.sum: Chelsea have changed their stance on a potential loan exit of Carney Chukwuemeka, according to Fabrizio Romano. According to Fabrizio Romano, Chelsea have changed their stance on loaning out Chukwuemeka.
